def qualified_for_financial_aid(self) -> bool:
        """
        This function takes a person object and returns the boolean value.
        Write the condition by defining the necessary attribute/attributes to select the person
        who is qualified to get financial aid.
        """
        if (self.gender in ['female', 'male']) and (self.age in [28, 30, 31, 44, 45, 46, 59, 60, 61]) and (self.race in ['asian', 'white', 'black', 'hispanic', 'indian']) and (self.employment_status in ['employed', 'retired']) and (self.education in ['college', 'bachelor', 'master', 'doctor']) and (self.marital_status in ['married', 'widowed']) and (self.religion in ['christianity']) and (self.income in [24000, 25000]):
            return True
        else:
            return False
